title: checkpoint.json
description: Durable execution state. Main agent sole writer.

plan_name.description: User-supplied or parsed work name. Used for _workspace/{plan_name}/ subdir.

status.description: in_progress = normal run; partial = post-completion patch; blocked = waiting on user; completed = done.

current_stage.description: Stage name parsed from workflow.md '### Stage N: {name}' header.

current_step.description: Step name parsed from workflow.md '#### Step N: {name}' header. ≡ Task.

active_pattern.description: Pattern of current_step. Drives invocation strategy in Step 2.

step_history.description: Append-only log of completed Steps with iteration count (loop pattern check).

stage_artifacts.description: Map: stage_name → list of artifact file paths produced.

handoff_chain.description: Active handoff sequence (handoff pattern only). Reset to [] on stage transition or step completion.

tasks_snapshot.description: Cached list of done task ids and currently-active task id.

shared_variables.description: Runtime symbolic placeholder values. Example: {selected_expert: '@bug-analyst'} for expert_pool resolution.

blocked_reason.description: Required when status=blocked. Surface to user via user confirmation request.

blocked_agent.description: Required when status=blocked. Identifies which task_*.json files to clear on resume.
